steps.title: Identify where tribal contribution ranks among the four
steps.content: Tribal economic activity contributed \$141,510 per employee. From the table: Professional services is \$110,157, Administration/waste is \$60,132, and Wholesale trade is \$183,790. The key signal is that tribal sits in the middle—above the two lower industries but below wholesale trade.

steps.title: Match the exact positioning to the choices
steps.content: Choice A describes tribal as below wholesale trade but above both professional services and administration/waste. This matches the data: \$141,510 is less than \$183,790 but greater than both \$110,157 and \$60,132. Choices B and C place tribal at the extremes (above or below all three), and D incorrectly calls it “nearly equal” to wholesale trade when the actual gap is \$42,280. That matches choice A — A is correct.
